OFFER: price=40
Proposing to sell X:1 at ZUP:40

<player answer>PROPOSAL</player answer>

ACCEPT: price=40
I accept the trade. Player RED gives X:1, and I give ZUP:40.

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:

<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The seller is proposing to sell X:1 at ZUP:40. My private value is 100 ZUP, so I am willing to pay up to 100 ZUP. This is below the seller's proposed price of 40 ZUP. I will accept this trade if it is valid. </reason>
<player answer>ACCEPT</player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 40</newly proposed trade>
<message> I accept the trade. Player RED gives X:1, and I give ZUP:40. </message>
